title: LlmPricingTable
description: Canonical pricing table for @diabolicallabs/llm-pricing. Provider → model → per-token USD rates.

versionedAt.description: ISO 8601 date the table was last verified against official pricing sources.

ProviderTable.description: Map of model ID → ModelPricing record.

ModelPricing.description: Per-model pricing record. All prices in USD per 1M tokens.

inputPer1M.description: USD per 1M input tokens (standard / cache miss rate).

cacheReadPer1M.description: USD per 1M cache read tokens. Omit if cache is not supported for this model.

cacheWritePer1M.description: USD per 1M cache write tokens (5-min ephemeral tier for Anthropic). Omit if not separately billed.

cacheWrite1hPer1M.description: USD per 1M cache write tokens for the 1-hour duration tier. Anthropic only.

longContextThreshold.description: Input token count above which long-context pricing applies (e.g. 200000 for Gemini 3.1 Pro).

longContextInputPer1M.description: USD per 1M input tokens when totalInputTokens > longContextThreshold.

longContextOutputPer1M.description: USD per 1M output tokens when totalInputTokens > longContextThreshold.

longContextCacheReadPer1M.description: USD per 1M cache read tokens when totalInputTokens > longContextThreshold.

hasInvisibleReasoningTokens.description: True for o-series / reasoning models that bill invisible reasoning tokens against outputPer1M. computeCost() marks result isPartial=true.

partialCostCoverage.description: True when known billing components (e.g. per-search fees) cannot be computed from token usage alone.

deprecatedAliasFor.description: If this model ID is a deprecated alias, the canonical model ID it resolves to.

verifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 date this record was last verified against provider pricing documentation.

sourceUrl.description: Source URL — official provider docs or best available cross-reference.
